title: Carumbium amboinicum
taxonomy: Carumbium amboinicum is classified within the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family. This classification places it among other plants that share similar characteristics and growth patterns. Within the family Lamiaceae, Carumbium amboinicum is further classified into the subfamily Lamioideae and the tribe Ocimeae. The species is also sometimes classified within the genus Plectranthus, although its classification can vary depending on the source. Further research may be necessary to determine the most accurate classification for Carumbium amboinicum.
